name: Build Cycle
description: Tests KRS-One, codex, sphinx, rakim, sentinel, hooks. Starts from Steps 1-4 complete with full master-plan.

compliance.name: prompt_skeleton
compliance.check: Codex prompt contains ≥4/6 skeleton sections (Commands, Architecture, Context, Task, Patterns & Pitfalls, Acceptance Criteria)

compliance.name: delegation_compliance
compliance.check: codex, sun-tzu, krs-one never used Write/Edit directly

compliance.name: bootstrap_before_dispatch
compliance.check: rakim and sentinel both signaled READY before KRS-One dispatched to codex

compliance.name: iteration_signal
compliance.check: KRS-One sent at least one ITERATION_COMPLETE or MILESTONE_COMPLETE signal
